message:
feat(vc_collect): migrate process, timeout, and fs from Tokio to Asupersync

Replace non-test Tokio API calls with Asupersync equivalents in executor.rs
and ssh.rs:

- tokio::process::Command → asupersync::process::Command
- Stdio::piped() → Stdio::Pipe
- child.wait_with_output() → child.wait_with_output_async()
- tokio::time::timeout(dur, fut) → asupersync::time::timeout(wall_now(), dur, fut)
- tokio::fs::write → asupersync::fs::write

tokio::sync::Mutex is intentionally kept — migrating it requires threading Cx
through the SshRunner API, which is a separate concern.
33 #[tokio::test] attributes remain for Phase 3 (bd-oy2).

Part of bd-2mi: Phase 2a - Migrate vc_collect to Asupersync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
